key_components: ActionKind enum (6 variants: Logs, Zellij, Pause, Kill, Retry, Remove)
actions_for_state() function filtering by card state (running/done/failed/pending/merged)
render_action_popup() using ratatui Clear + Block for centered overlay
Unit tests for action filtering by state
file_insights.dependencies: ratatui widgets (Block, Clear, List, ListItem, ListState), style primitives

additions: action_list_state: ListState field on App struct
open_action_popup() method to initialize ListState and switch Mode::ActionPopup
Import of actions_for_state from action module
file_insights.pattern: Stateful widget management - ListState tracks selected action index

additions: Enter key binding in handle_normal() to call open_action_popup()
Navigation: j/Down for next, k/Up for previous (cyclic wrapping)
Action execution dispatch on Enter, mode return on Esc
file_insights.pattern: Mode-based input dispatch with dedicated handlers per mode

patterns_discovered.name: State-filtered action palette
patterns_discovered.description: actions_for_state() matches card.state string and returns Vec<ActionEntry> with state-appropriate actions: running=[logs,zellij,pause,kill], done/failed=[retry], pending=[remove], merged=[]
patterns_discovered.benefit: Automatic action availability based on card lifecycle state without UI branching

patterns_discovered.name: Ratatui overlay pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Clear widget erases background, Block provides border/title, List provides selectable items, all rendered within centered_rect() viewport
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reusable centered popup template for command palettes

patterns_discovered.name: Cyclic list navigation
patterns_discovered.description: ListState selection wraps: j at last→0, k at first→len-1. Prevents off-bounds selection.
patterns_discovered.benefit: Familiar vim-like navigation without dead ends

patterns_discovered.name: Deferred async execution
patterns_discovered.description: ActionKind::Pause/Kill/Retry/Remove close popup and return Mode::Normal, but action execution deferred to future subtask. Only LogTail mode switches immediately.
patterns_discovered.benefit: Separates UI layer (immediate) from filesystem operations (future)

patterns_discovered.name: Viewport-aware sizing
patterns_discovered.description: Popup width clamped 30-50 chars, height bounded by action_count+2 and available space. Fallback render_empty_popup() for no-actions case.
patterns_discovered.benefit: Graceful degradation for small terminals and edge states

gotchas_discovered.description: When Enter is pressed on Pause/Kill/Retry/Remove, popup closes and mode returns to Normal, but no actual command is executed. Only LogTail mode switching is complete. Remaining actions await subtask 4-4+.
gotchas_discovered.impact: User can open popup and select actions, but won't see effects until command execution is wired
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Acceptable per spec - explicitly deferred; tested via mode transition coverage

gotchas_discovered.description: Cards with merged state have no available actions. render_action_popup() returns early and calls render_empty_popup() which uses different styling (DarkGray) and message ('no actions available')
gotchas_discovered.impact: User sees confirmation popup was opened, not a silent no-op
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Extra render path adds ~20 lines but improves UX clarity

gotchas_discovered.description: open_action_popup() only calls state.select(Some(0)) if actions vector is non-empty. If state.selected() is called on empty list, returns None.
gotchas_discovered.impact: Prevents panic on enumerate/index but requires null-checks in handle_action_popup()

gotchas_discovered.description: Navigation math (current >= len-1 → 0, current == 0 → len-1) assumes action_count > 0. If list is empty, logic never executes due to outer if guard.
gotchas_discovered.impact: No panic but navigation is no-op for empty lists

requirements_met: Renders as centered overlay using ratatui Clear + Block
Selectable List with j/k and arrow navigation
Enter in Normal mode opens popup, Esc closes it
Existing cmd_* function hooks prepared (deferred execution)
approach_details.test_coverage: Unit tests for actions_for_state() verify all 5 state branches, test helper function in tests module
approach_details.deferred_work: Command execution for Pause/Kill/Retry/Remove deferred to future subtasks; LogTail mode wiring deferred to 4-3

recommendations.recommendation: Implement command dispatch for Pause/Kill/Retry/Remove in next subtask. Consider wrapping cmd_pause() etc. in tokio::spawn() to avoid blocking render loop.
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation only switches modes; no actual card state changes occur

recommendations.recommendation: Complete LogTail mode wiring (subtask 4-3) to fully enable Logs action
recommendations.rationale: Only ActionKind::Logs mode switch is wired; others deferred

recommendations.recommendation: Add confirmation popup for Kill/Remove actions before dispatch
recommendations.rationale: Prevents accidental card deletion; common UX pattern in kanban tools

recommendations.recommendation: Memoize actions_for_state() results if called on every render frame
recommendations.rationale: Currently recalculated on every navigation keystroke; card state rarely changes mid-frame

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration tests for Mode::Normal → Mode::ActionPopup → Mode::Normal transitions
recommendations.rationale: Current tests only cover action filtering; mode transitions tested manually
